name: Shameless - South Side Chronicles
description:
Welcome to Chicago’s South Side, where the beer is cheap, the rent is overdue, and survival is a full-time job. Whether you were born into the chaos or just landed here, one thing is clear—this place doesn’t wait for you to figure it out. You either hustle, fight, or get screwed over. The Gallaghers are barely keeping it together, the Milkoviches run their own brand of trouble, and The Alibi is the only place that feels like home—if you don’t mind the occasional bar fight.

Here, family can be your greatest weapon—or your worst enemy. Maybe you’re a Gallagher, stuck between loyalty and survival, running scams just to keep the lights on. Maybe you’re a Milkovich, where a bad attitude and a good right hook mean more than words. Or hell, maybe you’re starting fresh, making a name for yourself in a city that eats the weak alive. What family do you want to be in—or are you making your own?

But this ain’t some fairytale. Every choice matters. Take a job from Lip? It might put cash in your pocket—or land you in jail. Owe money to Terry Milkovich? Hope you can fight. Fiona needs your help? You better not let her down. Your decisions shape your story, and in the South Side, mistakes come with a price.

No one’s handing you a safety net here. You gotta earn your place, make your own luck, and know when to fight or walk away. You can get into business, get into trouble, or get in way over your head. It’s all up to you. Make your OC or pick a character that already exists—just be ready to live with your choices.

REQUEST/SUGGEST AU/BOT HERE IN THIS FORM:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfz_srv4qJB1EELeGjuVbE1IX8BWf6DjtLUpHBNLGDvFE9aoQ/viewform
creator: _CaptainJuice_
